programme.desc: To stop an arms dealer from unleashing a superweapon, Brandon Beckett and Agent Zero lead a group of soldiers against an unrelenting militia.

programme.desc: Pilot Brodie Torrance makes a risky landing on a war-torn island. When his passengers are taken hostage, Brodie must rely on an accused murderer.

programme.title: The Jane Austen Book Club
